title: SCA — Shared Definitions
description: Reusable JSON Schema definitions shared across NYC School Construction Authority (SCA) object schemas. Reconciles fields common to the SCA Open Data datasets (data.cityofnewyork.us), nycsca.org, and the vendor-facing bidset SharePoint portal. Includes the NYC geography spine plus SCA's own project/building keys (Building ID/BIN, DSF Number, BBL) and the DOE/SCA Geographic (School) District dimension.

x-nyc-commons.note: Geography/identifier/address/money definitions are $ref'd from the canonical nyc-commons set; agency-specific definitions remain local.

Borough.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Borough); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Borough still resolve.

Coordinates.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/Coordinates); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Coordinates still resolve.

Geography.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (geography.json#/$defs/GeographySpine); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Geography still resolve.

GeographicDistrict.description: DOE/SCA Geographic (Community School) District — SCA's primary programmatic geography, districts 1-32 plus citywide District 75 ('Geographic District' / 'Geographical District' / 'Geo Dist').

ProjectReference.description: A reference to an SCA capital project / school building by its numbering keys.

schoolName.description: School / project name ('School Name' / 'Project School Name').

buildingId.description: SCA Building Identifier ('Building ID' / 'Project Building Identifier').

dsfNumber.description: Design Services Firm / project number ('DSF Number(s)').

projectNumber.description: SCA project number ('Project #' / 'Upcoming Project Design Number').

MoneyUSD.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD still resolve.

Money.$comment: Canonical definition provided by nyc-commons (money.json#/$defs/MoneyUSD); migrated from a local definition. Back-compatible: the $defs name is unchanged, so object schemas referencing _common.json#/$defs/Money still resolve.
